statement.call: logger.info('[ID:0365] 🔄 Starting application event loop...', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.info(f'[ID:0364] 👋 QApplication event loop exited with code: {result}', print_to_terminal=True)

logger.error('[ID:0375] 
❌ Dependency check failed. Please run:
 python pyside_chat/services/start_up/install_dependencies.py
 or
 python pyside_chat/services/start_up/check_dependencies.py')
logger.error('[ID:0370] ⚠️ Skipping dependency check (--skip-deps flag used)')
logger.error('[ID:0371] ❌ Cannot start application due to missing dependencies.')
logger.debug(f'[ID:0219] Error loading config: {e}, using defaults', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f'[ID:0297] DEBUG: handle_ai_response called with response length: {len(response)}')
logger.debug(f'[ID:0296] DEBUG: About to auto-save conversation with {len(messages)} messages')
logger.debug(f'[ID:0289] DEBUG: Triggering name generation for: {filepath}')
logger.debug('[ID:0285] DEBUG: No blank conversation found, creating new one')
logger.debug(f'[ID:0284] DEBUG: Set new conversation file: {new_filepath}')
logger.debug('[ID:0293] DEBUG: Auto-save returned None - conversation not saved')
logger.debug(f'[ID:0287] DEBUG: Found existing blank conversation: {existing_blank}')
logger.debug(f'[ID:0286] DEBUG: Reusing existing blank conversation: {existing_blank}')
logger.debug(f'[ID:0283] DEBUG: Initial conversation file created: {saved_filepath}')
logger.debug('[ID:0282] DEBUG: Failed to create initial conversation file')
logger.debug(f'[ID:0292] TTS triggered for AI response (length: {len(spoken_text)})')
logger.debug('[ID:0291] No chat tab reference available for TTS')
logger.error(f'[ID:0290] Error triggering TTS for AI response: {e}')
logger.info('[ID:0327] Application show event handled successfully')
logger.info('[ID:0324] Application close event handled successfully')
logger.error(f'[ID:0323] Error showing initialization error dialog: {e}')
logger.info('[ID:0322] All signal connections established successfully')
logger.debug('[ID:0311] Both worker and TTS finished, cleaning up')
logger.debug('[ID:0310] Worker finished but TTS still running, waiting for TTS')
logger.debug('[ID:0308] Worker thread still running, waiting for it to finish')
logger.debug('[ID:0307] Worker thread not running, cleaning up immediately')
logger.error(f'[ID:0306] Error in delayed TTS finished handling: {e}')
logger.info('[ID:0316] No AI name exists, triggering generation...')
logger.debug('[ID:0302] Worker thread not running, cleaning up')
logger.error(f'[ID:0301] Error cleaning up worker thread: {e}')
logger.warning('[ID:0304] Worker thread did not quit within timeout, marking for deletion')
logger.info('[ID:0234] Menu bar setup completed successfully')
logger.error(f'[ID:0233] Error setting up menu bar: {e}')
logger.error(f'[ID:0228] Error showing clear chat dialog: {e}')
logger.debug(f'[ID:0204] Auto-save attempt - enabled: {self.metadata.auto_save_enabled}, conversation length: {(len(conversation) if conversation else 0)}')
logger.debug(f"[ID:0217] Updating conversation name for {filepath} to '{ai_generated_name}'")
logger.debug(f'[ID:0206] Successfully updated conversation name, returning: {new_filepath}')
logger.debug('[ID:0203] Auto-save skipped: auto_save_enabled is False')
logger.debug(f'[ID:0211] File exists, using timestamped filename: {new_filepath}')
logger.debug(f'[ID:0207] Updated current conversation file reference to: {new_filepath}')
logger.error(f'[ID:0205] Failed to update conversation name: {str(e)}')
logger.debug(f'[ID:0195] Failed to rename {old_filepath} to {new_filepath}: {e}', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f'[ID:0200] Could not read existing file for AI name preservation: {e}')
logger.warning(f'[ID:0208] Failed to remove old file {filepath}: {e}')
logger.debug('[ID:0202] Auto-save skipped: conversation is empty and existing file has content')
logger.debug(f'[ID:0027] DEBUG: Added message to conversation: {message}')
logger.debug(f"[ID:0025] DEBUG: Conversation contents: {[msg.get('role', 'unknown') for msg in self.conversation]}")
logger.debug(f'[ID:0024] DEBUG: get_messages called, returning {len(self.conversation)} messages')
logger.debug(f"[ID:0023] DEBUG: Message roles: {[msg.get('role', 'unknown') for msg in self.conversation]}")
logger.debug(f'[ID:0145] === LTM ADD ENTRY START ===', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f"[ID:0144] Adding entry: type='{entry.type}', key='{entry.key}', value='{entry.value}'", print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f'[ID:0142] Entry added to memory, new count: {len(self.entries)}', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f'[ID:0139] === LTM ADD ENTRY END ===', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug('[ID:0131] Semantic search embeddings updated', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f'[ID:0120] === INTELLIGENT MESSAGE ADDITION START ===', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug('[ID:0118] Message added to STM', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f'[ID:0113] === INTELLIGENT MESSAGE ADDITION END ===', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f"[ID:0092] Memory cleared: type={(memory_type if memory_type else 'all')}", print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f'[ID:0084] === MEMORY SERVICE ADD FACT START ===', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f"[ID:0083] Adding fact: key='{key}', value='{value}', importance={importance}", print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f'[ID:0067] Set max context messages to {max_messages}', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f'[ID:0061] Memory cleanup complete: {old_count} -> {new_count} entries', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug('[ID:0136] LTM file saved successfully', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f'[ID:0126] Summary added to LTM', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f"[ID:0123] Using semantic search for query: '{query}'", print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f"[ID:0121] Using keyword-based search for query: '{query}'", print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug('[ID:0102] Retrieving relevant LTM entries...', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f'[ID:0101] Found {len(relevant_ltm)} relevant LTM entries', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f"[ID:0080] Cleaned inputs: key='{clean_key}', value='{clean_value}'", print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug('[ID:0077] Checking for existing facts to avoid duplicates...', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug('[ID:0074] No duplicate found, creating new fact entry', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f'[ID:0072] Added fact to LTM: {clean_key} = {clean_value}', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f'[ID:0068] === MEMORY SERVICE ADD FACT END ===', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.error(f'[ID:0148] Error saving STM file: {e}', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.error(f'[ID:0135] Error saving LTM file: {e}', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug('[ID:0116] Message qualifies for LTM storage', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug('[ID:0114] Message does not qualify for LTM storage', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug('[ID:0094] All memory files cleared successfully', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.error(f'[ID:0085] Error verifying memory files: {e}', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f"[ID:0082] Invalid fact data: key='{key}', value='{value}'", print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f'[ID:0081] Fact key and value must be strings: key={type(key)}, value={type(value)}', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug('[ID:0078] Fact key or value is empty after cleaning', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f"[ID:0065] Found {len(entries)} entries for key '{key}': {[e.value for e in entries]}", print_to_terminal=True)
logger.error(f'[ID:0149] Error loading STM file: {e}', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.error(f'[ID:0146] Error loading LTM file: {e}', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f'[ID:0122] Found relevant memory via semantic search: {memory_id} (similarity: {similarity:.3f})', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f'[ID:0097] Cleared short-term memory file: {self.stm.stm_file}', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f'[ID:0096] Cleared long-term memory file: {self.ltm.ltm_file}', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.error(f'[ID:0093] Error clearing memory files: {e}', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f"[ID:0062] Keeping most recent entry for '{key}': {entries[0].value}", print_to_terminal=True)
logger.warning(f'[ID:0091] Short-term memory file not empty after clearing: {len(stm_data)} entries', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug('[ID:0090] Short-term memory file verified as empty', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.warning(f'[ID:0089] Long-term memory file not empty after clearing: {len(ltm_data)} entries', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug('[ID:0088] Long-term memory file verified as empty', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.warning(f'[ID:0087] Memories file not empty after clearing: {len(memories_data)} entries', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug('[ID:0086] Memories file verified as empty', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f'[ID:0063] No valid names found, keeping most recent: {entries[0].value}', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.error(f'[ID:0147] Error loading LTM entry {entry_data}: {e}', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f'[ID:0021] DEBUG: Attempting to connect to Ollama at: {self.base_url}/tags')
logger.info(f'[ID:0059] Loading sentence transformer model: {self.model_name}', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.info('[ID:0058] Sentence transformer model loaded successfully', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f'[ID:0052] Saved {len(self.vectorized_memories)} embeddings to cache', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.warning('[ID:0050] Model not initialized, cannot add memory with embedding', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f'[ID:0048] Added memory {memory_id} with embedding', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug('[ID:0043] No model or memories available for semantic search', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f"[ID:0041] Semantic search found {len(results)} results for query: '{query}'", print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug('[ID:0038] No model or memories available for hybrid search', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f"[ID:0036] Hybrid search found {len(results)} results for query: '{query}'", print_to_terminal=True)
logger.info('[ID:0029] Cleared all vectorized memories', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.error(f'[ID:0057] Error loading sentence transformer model: {e}', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.error('[ID:0056] Falling back to keyword-based search', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.info('[ID:0055] Loading existing embeddings from cache', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f'[ID:0049] Memory {memory_id} already exists, updating', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.error(f'[ID:0047] Error adding memory with embedding: {e}', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug('[ID:0042] No memories match the specified types', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.error(f'[ID:0039] Error in semantic search: {e}', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug('[ID:0037] No memories match the specified types', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.error(f'[ID:0034] Error in hybrid search: {e}', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f'[ID:0033] Updated importance for memory {memory_id}: {new_importance}', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f'[ID:0032] Memory {memory_id} not found for importance update', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.error(f'[ID:0031] Error updating memory importance: {e}', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.error(f'[ID:0030] Error getting memory stats: {e}', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.error(f'[ID:0028] Error clearing vectorized memories: {e}', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f'[ID:0176] Created summarization prompt with {len(sample_messages)} sample messages')
logger.debug(f'[ID:0156] Fallback check: {substantial_messages} substantial messages out of {len(user_messages)} total')
logger.info(f'[ID:0194] Starting name generation for conversation: {filepath}')
logger.info(f'[ID:0193] Conversation has {len(conversation)} messages, minimum required: {self.min_messages_for_summarization}')
logger.info(f'[ID:0189] Found {len(user_messages)} user messages for summarization')
logger.info(f'[ID:0184] Sending summarization request to model: {chosen_model}')
logger.debug('[ID:0168] AI indicated no clear topic found')
logger.debug(f"[ID:0164] AI determined name '{name}' is not suitable")
logger.debug(f'[ID:0192] Not enough messages ({len(conversation)}) for summarization')
logger.debug('[ID:0191] No user messages found for summarization')
logger.debug('[ID:0190] Conversation lacks sufficient substance for meaningful naming')
logger.warning('[ID:0179] Failed to generate valid chat name')
logger.debug(f'[ID:0161] Auto-selected model for quality evaluation: {chosen_model}')
logger.debug('[ID:0159] AI determined conversation has sufficient substance')
logger.debug('[ID:0158] AI determined conversation lacks sufficient substance')
logger.debug(f'[ID:0154] Auto-selected model for name quality evaluation: {chosen_model}')
logger.debug('[ID:0152] AI determined name is suitable')
logger.debug('[ID:0151] AI determined name is not suitable')
logger.warning('[ID:0186] No models available for summarization')
logger.warning('[ID:0162] No models available for quality evaluation')
logger.warning('[ID:0155] No models available for name quality evaluation')
print(f"[ID:0337] \nOverall status: {('✅ All good' if not needs_fixing else '❌ Needs fixing')}")
print(f"[ID:0336] Can start application: {('✅ Yes' if not needs_fixing else '❌ No')}")
print('[ID:0356] All dependencies are working correctly!')
print("[ID:0347] Run 'python pyside_chat/services/start_up/install_dependencies.py' to install missing dependencies")
print(f'[ID:0361] Error: install_dependencies.py not found at {install_script}')
print('[ID:0348] Failed to install dependencies automatically')
print('[ID:0350] All dependencies are now working!')
print('[ID:0349] Some dependencies may still have issues')
logger.debug(f'[ID:0227] Failed to update system personalities list: {e}', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f'[ID:0226] Failed to update custom personalities list: {e}', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f'[ID:0225] Error getting available personalities: {e}', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f'[ID:0281] SETTINGS: UI not ready yet, skipping settings load', print_to_terminal=False)
logger.debug(f'[ID:0279] SETTINGS: Error loading settings: {e}', print_to_terminal=True)
logger.debug(f'[ID:0280] SETTINGS: UI elements deleted during load: {e}', print_to_terminal=True)
